title: SPECTROPHOTOMETRIC AND CONDUCTOMETRlC STUDIES OF METAL COMPLEXES OF 3-HYDROXY-I-p-SULPBONATOPHENYL,- 3-PHENYLTRIAZINE PART IV. IRON COMPLEX
author: R. N. MATHUR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fen forms a bluish black, water-soluble complex with 3-hydroxy- \(I\) - \(p\) -sulphonatichenyl-3-phenyl­triazine. The Formula of the complex, established spectrophotometrically by applying Job's continued variation method, slope ratio method and molar ratio method, has been found to be FeR 3  (R= reagent) in the  \(p\) H range between 2.0 and 4.3. At higher  \(p\) H values FeR 2+  and FeR 2+  are indicated. Conductometricallv all the three for molne are Ind:acted. The dissociation constant of FeR 3  at 20 4  is 2.38 x 10 -12  and the free energy of formation of the complex is —15.59 K cal./mole.
